report_name: 'Bavaqai' Threat Actor Claims Data Breach of Canadian Armed Forces Amidst Flurry of Global Cyberattacks

threat_actors.name: Bavaqai
threat_actors.description: A threat actor that claimed responsibility for a data breach against the Canadian Armed Forces on July 9, 2026. The motivations are suspected to range from espionage to data theft for extortion.

threat_actors.name: Chaos
threat_actors.description: A threat actor that claimed responsibility for a data breach against the US pharmaceutical company CorePharma on July 9, 2026.

threat_actors.name: CRPxO
threat_actors.description: A threat actor that claimed responsibility for a data breach against the Chinese biotech firm Amhwa Biopharm on July 9, 2026.

threat_actors.name: Metaencryptor
threat_actors.description: A threat actor that claimed responsibility for a data breach against the Japanese manufacturer Corona Corporation on July 9, 2026. The name suggests a possible ransomware group.

threat_actors.name: SpaceBears
threat_actors.description: A threat actor that claimed responsibility for a data breach against the Italian industrial company BiesSse on July 9, 2026. The name suggests potential nation-state activity.

identities.name: Canadian Armed Forces
identities.description: A Canadian government military organization that was the target of a data breach claimed by the threat actor Bavaqai.

identities.name: CorePharma
identities.description: A US-based pharmaceutical company targeted in a data breach claimed by the threat actor 'Chaos'.

identities.name: Amhwa Biopharm
identities.description: A Chinese biotechnology firm targeted in a data breach claimed by the threat actor 'CRPxO'.

identities.name: Corona Corporation
identities.description: A Japanese manufacturing company targeted in a data breach claimed by the threat actor 'Metaencryptor'.

identities.name: BiesSse
identities.description: An Italian industrial company targeted in a data breach claimed by the threat actor 'SpaceBears'.

indicators.name: Canadian Armed Forces Domain DNS Query
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Canadian Armed Forces Domain DNS Query
id: 2b8c1f9a-3e4d-4b1a-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Monitors for DNS queries to the official Canadian Armed Forces domain. While legitimate, this could be an indicator of reconnaissance or pre-phishing activity in some contexts.
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-10
level: informational
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName: 'forces.gc.ca'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Monitors for DNS queries to the official Canadian Armed Forces domain (forces.gc.ca), which could be relevant for monitoring reconnaissance or phishing preparation.

relationships.source_name: Canadian Armed Forces Domain DNS Query
